final:
module top_module(
    input  A1  ,
    input  A2  ,
    input  B1  ,
    input  B2  ,
    input  C1  ,
    output Y   ,
    input  VPWR,
    input  VGND
  wire temp1_(A1 & A2) | (B1 & B2) = (A1 & A2) | (B1 & B2);
  wire temp2_C1 = C1;
  assign Y = temp1_(A1 & A2) | (B1 & B2) | temp2_C1;

endmodule
